notes: Inline SVG form-demo drawings keyed by exercise id (companion to exercise_library.json). Each value is a self-contained <svg> using CSS variables (var(--ink), var(--ink-3), var(--accent), var(--line)) so it themes with the artifact. Ghost/dashed pose = start, solid pose = end/finish, accent arrow = motion direction. No external references. Generated by gen_demos.js.
